message:
fix(cli): validate theme file paths before --version early exit

When running `pi --theme nonexistent.json --version`, the --version flag
caused an early return before theme validation, silently ignoring invalid
themes. This was reported as bd-1q1p.

Changes:
- Move cwd initialization before --version check
- Add early theme validation for path-like specs (files with .json, /, ~)
- Make `looks_like_theme_path()` public so main.rs can use it
- Named themes (without path indicators) still validate after resource loading

This ensures users get immediate feedback about invalid theme file paths
regardless of other flags. The e2e_cli_theme_flag_invalid_path test now
correctly exercises this behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
